---
title: "Detection of neighbor-stranger recognition using complex interaction networks"
image: "../images/card_pics/antshrike_02.jpg"
description: "By applying network analysis to vocal interactions, we uncover hidden patterns of neighbor-stranger recognition. This approach improves detection of social recognition processes that traditional playback and analysis approaches may miss."
categories: ["Animal Communication & Contest Dynamics"]
contributors: "Erin Stewart, Jess Kowalski"
feature_order: "j"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
